title: Project canonical operator decision axis in Leitstand
goal: Add a read-only Leitstand decision-axis projection that compresses existing operator truth into Jetzt, Im Fokus, Blockiert, Konvergenz and Danach without inventing a new priority, task, runtime or convergence authority. Jetzt and Danach come from canonical Bureau ranking, Im Fokus from the Bureau Live Register, Blockiert from source-bound blocker evidence, and Konvergenz from existing convergence evidence. Leitstand must preserve its observer invariant and consume producer-side snapshots rather than calling Bureau or Grabowski in the request path.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized implementation on 2026-07-23. Preserve Leitstand as a read-only derived display and the existing producer-side snapshot boundary.

acceptance.assertion: A machine-readable producer-side snapshot exposes Jetzt, Im Fokus, Blockiert, Konvergenz and Danach with explicit source and freshness metadata and without assigning new priority or lifecycle semantics.

Jetzt and Danach are derived from canonical Bureau ranking, Im Fokus from the Live Register, Blockiert from bounded source-bound blocker evidence, and Konvergenz from existing convergence evidence; missing or stale evidence remains visibly degraded instead of being inferred green.
Leitstand performs no request-time calls to Bureau or Grabowski and gains no claim, dispatch, merge, deployment, task mutation or runtime mutation authority.
The dashboard or a dedicated operator view renders the five decision-axis sections clearly and source-links or discloses provenance and freshness without duplicating the full Bureau board.
Tests cover fresh complete data, missing or stale sources, no current eligible ball, bounded blockers and convergence states, and prove that the view remains read-only and snapshot-backed.
Existing Bureau task snapshots and convergence or operator artifacts are reused or extended; no second queue, focus registry or global status model is introduced.

does_not_establish: permission to mutate foreign dirty worktrees

validation.head_bound_full_ci: Full Leitstand local CI, release-runtime tests, browser checks, repository/docs/generated/drift guards and observer-invariant guard passed on the reviewed implementation heads; GitHub CI and CodeQL were green on the exact PR heads before merge.
validation.producer_proof: Real producer proof against current Bureau and Grabowski sources generated all five bounded sections without inventing missing values.
validation.release_verify: leitstand-release.py verify succeeded for exact live merge commit 019db0d598888f33e5ee8aafd8655d69a58252f8.

live_proof.decision_axis: Live dashboard contains Entscheidungsachse and all five sections Jetzt, Im Fokus, Blockiert, Konvergenz and Danach.
live_proof.snapshot_contract: Live artifact kind is leitstand_operator_decision_axis_snapshot; section statuses at proof time: now=available, focus=available, blocked=available, convergence=unknown, later=unknown. Unknown remains an explicit degraded projection rather than inferred truth.
live_proof.ecosystem_consumer: Live ecosystem map reports 6/6 artifacts and no manifest_corrupt.

verified_acceptance.decision-axis-contract: Verified by the producer-side leitstand_operator_decision_axis_snapshot with exactly now, focus, blocked, convergence and later sections plus source/freshness status.
verified_acceptance.canonical-sources: Verified live: Bureau status-projection/registry queue feeds Jetzt and Danach, Bureau Live Register feeds Im Fokus, Bureau blocker evidence feeds Blockiert, and Grabowski current_work feeds Konvergenz; degraded convergence remains unknown.
verified_acceptance.observer-invariant: Verified by controller design, observer-invariant guard and live release: Bureau/Grabowski collection stays producer-side; request-time controller only reads the snapshot.
verified_acceptance.ui: Verified live over http://127.0.0.1:3000/: all five decision-axis labels render on the dashboard.
verified_acceptance.tests: Verified by focused decision-axis/export tests, complete local CI, release-runtime tests, browser checks and green GitHub CI/CodeQL.
verified_acceptance.integration: Verified: existing Bureau and Grabowski projections are reused; no second queue, focus registry, priority store or global status model was introduced.

metadata.verification_note: Leitstand PR #184 and runtime-binding PR #186 are merged. Exact merge commit 019db0d598888f33e5ee8aafd8655d69a58252f8 is the selected sealed live release, the installed producer wrapper is byte-bound to that release, the live snapshot exists, and HTTP consumer readback shows all five read-only sections.
